title: glyceria distans f. pulvinata
intro: Glyceria distans f. pulvinata, also known as the fountaingrass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues and inflammation, and is also used to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. The health benefits of Glyceria distans f. pulvinata include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Glyceria distans f. pulvinata include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water.
